next_steps: Targeted image-guided core biopsy of the retroperitoneal or pericardial tissue
BRAF V600E mutation analysis on biopsy tissue
Brain MRI with focus on the hypothalamus and pituitary gland
Assessment of serum and urine osmolality with electrolytes to confirm diabetes insipidus
Radiographic skeletal survey of long bones to look for osteosclerosis
Whole-body 18F-FDG PET-CT to evaluate systemic distribution
